recommendations.title: Conduct Immediate Board-Level Compliance Review
recommendations.description: Initiate a comprehensive board-level review of coal import pricing and related governance practices to address Bangladesh Central Bank allegations and prevent regulatory fines.
recommendations.responsible_party: Chief Compliance Officer & Board of Directors
recommendations.profitability_link: Avoid potential regulatory fines of ₹50-200 Cr and cost of capital increase by 20-40 bps, preserving valuation and investor confidence.
recommendations.peer_benchmark: Competitors have initiated similar board-level reviews post regulatory scrutiny to maintain compliance and investor trust.

recommendations.title: Enhance ESG Disclosure and Transparency
recommendations.description: Upgrade GRI and BRSR disclosures to transparently report coal pricing practices and remediation steps, aiming to improve ESG ratings and attract ESG-focused funds.
recommendations.profitability_link: Improved ESG ratings can reduce fund outflows and attract ESG funds, potentially increasing valuation by 5-10%, equating to ₹100-200 Cr uplift.
recommendations.peer_benchmark: Peer companies have enhanced ESG disclosures post-controversy, resulting in improved fund inflows and valuation premiums.

recommendations.title: Develop Proactive ESG Remediation Communication Strategy
recommendations.description: Launch a transparent communication campaign detailing corrective actions and compliance improvements to rebuild stakeholder trust and differentiate ESG narrative.
recommendations.profitability_link: Improved ESG positioning can attract DJSI inclusion, unlocking ~5-10% valuation premium worth ₹100-200 Cr.
recommendations.peer_benchmark: Competitors enhanced ESG narratives post-controversy, gaining DJSI inclusion and increased ESG fund inflows.

recommendations.title: Implement Robust Enterprise Risk Management (ERM) Framework
recommendations.description: Strengthen COSO ERM maturity by integrating coal import pricing risk controls and monitoring to improve credit ratings and reduce cost of capital.
recommendations.profitability_link: Enhanced ERM can reduce cost of capital by 20-40 bps, saving ₹30-60 Cr annually in financing costs.
recommendations.peer_benchmark: Leading power companies improved ERM post regulatory issues, resulting in better credit ratings and lower borrowing costs.

immediate_low.title: Develop Proactive ESG Remediation Communication Strategy
Implement Robust Enterprise Risk Management (ERM) Framework
